titleStmt.title: SII 40.199: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 199. (A.R. No. B. 186 of 1932.) Aravapalle (hamlet of Melandoḍḍi), Punganur Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Sādhāraṇa, Chaitra śu. 5.
Records a perumbaḷi-sarvamānya grant of the village Attikuṇṭa made to a certain Gollanāgu Vōbulēśa by Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Timmappa Nāyaka, son of Tippi-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatu sādhāraṇa saṁvatsara
caitra śu 5 lu śrīrmanmahānāyaṁ
kacāryulaina tippināyani ko
māra tiṁmappanāyaniṁgāru go
llanāgu vobuḷēśuniki yicinaperuṁba
ḷi silāśāsanakramameṭlananu yīdinaṁ
Ārabhyagānu Attikuṁṭa staḷaṁ nīku yi
stimi ganaka yiṁduku yella polimērala
vivaraṁ tūrpuku kriṣṇāpuraṁ yella śāsanā
lu muccumāmiḍikuṁṭaku paḍamaṭi poda
lakuṁṭa dakṣaṇānaku mādanipalleku pōyi
na Aḍadaṁḍa dokatārlapalli polaṁ Aṁcu
nala gaṭṭu paḍamaṭiki mīla baṁḍaśāsanā
lu gopiseṭṭipalle polaṁ mera śāsanālu vu
ttarānaku cina Attikuṁṭa konamaḍladagaripuṭa
dinnalu yī kuṁṭa tūrpumaravanala guṁḍlu

102 Ā tūrputōḷlabaṁḍḍa Attikuṁ
ṭastaḷaṁ kaṁnyapolaṁ yiṁdku calle talli galasina kuṁṭa
lu 7 nnunīvu virivigā sāgiṁcukoniyi grāmāna puṭṭina rokha
dānyālu kāṇike vallenaṁ nalleddu suṁkaṁ mahirācaguttacāki
maṁggalipaṁnnu maggaṁ pannu sahā nīku sarvamānyaṁgā yisti
mi nīvu mā tāta vobiḷināyini pēruna ko
mārunimapēru bēḍitivi ganaka māputra
pauvūtra pāraṁpariyaṁtaṁmunnu na
ḍapagalavāraṁ yiṁduku yavvaru kīḍu
dalaci Āsiṁcinānū vāraṇāsi
lonu bāpani gōvunu tamasugu
ruvula caṁpina pāpānabōduru
Digital edition of SII 40.199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
